use_cases: Form submission buttons with animated loading states
Interactive call-to-action buttons with success/error feedback
Multi-state buttons requiring blur transition animations
ai_summary: A versatile animated button component featuring Framer Motion text blur transitions and spring physics. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, with built-in state management for idle, loading, success, and error states using contextual icons.
